channel.title: Golang on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Golang on Arrans github.io

item.title: nektos/act
item.description: Run your GitHub Actions locally 🚀

item.title: goreleaser/goreleaser
item.description: Deliver Go binaries as fast and easily as possible

item.title: jaevor/go-nanoid
item.description: Nano ID for Go

item.title: fullstorydev/grpcurl
item.description: Like cURL, but for gRPC: Command-line tool for interacting with gRPC servers

item.title: ente-io/ente
item.description: Fully open source, End to End Encrypted alternative to Google Photos and Apple Photos

item.title: dolthub/dolt
item.description: Dolt – Git for Data

item.title: go-gorm/gorm
item.description: The fantastic ORM library for Golang, aims to be developer friendly

item.title: fyne-io/fyne
item.description: Cross platform GUI toolkit in Go inspired by Material Design

item.title: inbucket/inbucket
item.description: Disposable webmail server (similar to Mailinator) with built in SMTP, POP3, RESTful servers; no DB required.

item.title: avelino/awesome-go
item.description: A curated list of awesome Go frameworks, libraries and software

item.title: terrastruct/d2
item.description: D2 is a modern diagram scripting language that turns text to diagrams.

item.title: gitleaks/gitleaks
item.description: Protect and discover secrets using Gitleaks 🔑

item.title: miniflux/v2
item.description: Minimalist and opinionated feed reader

item.title: sachaos/viddy
item.description: 👀 A modern watch command. Time machine and pager etc.

item.title: OpenDiablo2/OpenDiablo2
item.description: An open source re-implementation of Diablo 2

item.title: ollama/ollama
item.description: Get up and running with Llama 3.1, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models.

item.title: Ebazhanov/linkedin-skill-assessments-quizzes
item.description: Full reference of LinkedIn answers 2024 for skill assessments (aws-lambda, rest-api, javascript, react, git, html, jquery, mongodb, java, Go, python, machine-learning, power-point) linkedin excel test lösungen, linkedin machine learning test LinkedIn test questions and answers

item.title: gocolly/colly
item.description: Elegant Scraper and Crawler Framework for Golang

item.title: golang/go
item.description: The Go programming language

item.title: golang-standards/project-layout
item.description: Standard Go Project Layout

item.title: gopherjs/gopherjs
item.description: A compiler from Go to JavaScript for running Go code in a browser

item.title: burrowers/garble
item.description: Obfuscate Go builds

item.title: nutsdb/nutsdb
item.description: A simple, fast, embeddable, persistent key/value store written in pure Go. It supports fully serializable transactions and many data structures such as list, set, sorted set.

item.title: golang/oauth2
item.description: Go OAuth2

item.title: pocketbase/pocketbase
item.description: Open Source realtime backend in 1 file

item.title: gravitational/teleport
item.description: The easiest, and most secure way to access and protect all of your infrastructure.

item.title: go-git/go-git
item.description: A highly extensible Git implementation in pure Go.

item.title: expr-lang/expr
item.description: Expression language and expression evaluation for Go

item.title: storj/storj
item.description: Ongoing Storj v3 development. Decentralized cloud object storage that is affordable, easy to use, private, and secure.

item.title: rclone/rclone
item.description: “rsync for cloud storage” - Google Drive, S3, Dropbox, Backblaze B2, One Drive, Swift, Hubic, Wasabi, Google Cloud Storage, Azure Blob, Azure Files, Yandex Files

item.title: redis/rueidis
item.description: A fast Golang Redis client that supports Client Side Caching, Auto Pipelining, Generics OM, RedisJSON, RedisBloom, RediSearch, etc.

item.title: rebuy-de/aws-nuke
item.description: Nuke a whole AWS account and delete all its resources.

item.title: tmrts/go-patterns
item.description: Curated list of Go design patterns, recipes and idioms

item.title: gotify/server
item.description: A simple server for sending and receiving messages in real-time per WebSocket. (Includes a sleek web-ui)

item.title: caddyserver/caddy
item.description: Fast and extensible multi-platform HTTP/1-2-3 web server with automatic HTTPS

item.title: wneessen/go-mail
item.description: 📧 Easy to use, yet comprehensive library for sending mails with Go

item.title: microcosm-cc/bluemonday
item.description: bluemonday: a fast golang HTML sanitizer (inspired by the OWASP Java HTML Sanitizer) to scrub user generated content of XSS

item.title: zyedidia/micro
item.description: A modern and intuitive terminal-based text editor

item.title: authelia/authelia
item.description: The Single Sign-On Multi-Factor portal for web apps

item.title: openziti/zrok
item.description: Geo-scale, next-generation peer-to-peer sharing platform built on top of OpenZiti.

item.title: micro/go-micro
item.description: A Go microservices framework

item.title: cli/cli
item.description: GitHub’s official command line tool

item.title: swaggo/swag
item.description: Automatically generate RESTful API documentation with Swagger 2.0 for Go.

item.title: moderato-app/approf
item.description: A native macOS app for pprof

item.title: tinode/chat
item.description: Instant messaging platform. Backend in Go. Clients: Swift iOS, Java Android, JS webapp, scriptable command line; chatbots

item.title: googleapis/google-cloud-go
item.description: Google Cloud Client Libraries for Go.

item.title: photoprism/photoprism
item.description: AI-Powered Photos App for the Decentralized Web 🌈💎✨

item.title: akhilrex/podgrab
item.description: A self-hosted podcast manager/downloader/archiver tool to download podcast episodes as soon as they become live with an integrated player.

item.title: rfjakob/gocryptfs
item.description: Encrypted overlay filesystem written in Go

item.title: hajimehoshi/ebiten
item.description: Ebitengine - A dead simple 2D game engine for Go

item.title: go-vikunja/vikunja
item.description: Mirror of vikunja from https://code.vikunja.io/api

item.title: go-delve/delve
item.description: Delve is a debugger for the Go programming language.

item.title: juicedata/juicefs
item.description: JuiceFS is a distributed POSIX file system built on top of Redis and S3.

item.title: EchoVault/EchoVault
item.description: Embeddable and distributed in-memory alternative to Redis.

item.title: wcharczuk/go-chart
item.description: go chart is a basic charting library in go.

item.title: AllenDang/giu
item.description: Cross platform rapid GUI framework for golang based on Dear ImGui.

item.title: gofiber/fiber
item.description: ⚡️ Express inspired web framework written in Go

item.title: alecthomas/chroma
item.description: A general purpose syntax highlighter in pure Go

item.title: yuin/goldmark
item.description: 🏆 A markdown parser written in Go. Easy to extend, standard(CommonMark) compliant, well structured.

item.title: gobwas/ws
item.description: Tiny WebSocket library for Go.

item.title: dgraph-io/badger
item.description: Fast key-value DB in Go.

item.title: esimov/triangle
item.description: Convert images to computer generated art using delaunay triangulation.

item.title: traefik/traefik
item.description: The Cloud Native Application Proxy

item.title: wader/fq
item.description: jq for binary formats - tool, language and decoders for working with binary and text formats

item.title: sashabaranov/go-openai
item.description: OpenAI ChatGPT, GPT-3, GPT-4, DALL·E, Whisper API wrapper for Go

item.title: brianvoe/gofakeit
item.description: Random fake data generator written in go

item.title: bitfield/script
item.description: Making it easy to write shell-like scripts in Go

item.title: aarzilli/nucular
item.description: GUI toolkit for go

item.title: kataras/iris
item.description: The fastest HTTP/2 Go Web Framework. New, modern and easy to learn. Fast development with Code you control. Unbeatable cost-performance ratio 🚀

item.title: noborus/ov
item.description: 🎑Feature-rich terminal-based text viewer. It is a so-called terminal pager.

item.title: schollz/croc
item.description: Easily and securely send things from one computer to another 🐊 📦

item.title: openziti/ziti
item.description: The parent project for OpenZiti. Here you will find the executables for a fully zero trust, application embedded, programmable network @OpenZiti

item.title: gliderlabs/ssh
item.description: Easy SSH servers in Golang

item.title: matrix-org/dendrite
item.description: Dendrite is a second-generation Matrix homeserver written in Go!

item.title: openfaas/faas
item.description: OpenFaaS - Serverless Functions Made Simple

item.title: traefik/yaegi
item.description: Yaegi is Another Elegant Go Interpreter

item.title: caddyserver/certmagic
item.description: Automatic HTTPS for any Go program: fully-managed TLS certificate issuance and renewal

item.title: dundee/gdu
item.description: Fast disk usage analyzer with console interface written in Go

item.title: shopspring/decimal
item.description: Arbitrary-precision fixed-point decimal numbers in Go

item.title: gostor/awesome-go-storage
item.description: A curated list of awesome Go storage projects and libraries

item.title: riverqueue/river
item.description: Fast and reliable background jobs in Go

item.title: wailsapp/wails
item.description: Create beautiful applications using Go

item.title: dkorunic/betteralign
item.description: Make your Go programs use less memory (maybe)

item.title: ergo-services/ergo
item.description: An actor-based Framework with network transparency for creating event-driven architecture in Golang. Inspired by Erlang. Zero dependencies.

item.title: owncast/owncast
item.description: Take control over your live stream video by running it yourself. Streaming + chat out of the box.

item.title: fatih/vim-go
item.description: Go development plugin for Vim

item.title: johnfercher/maroto
item.description: A maroto way to create PDFs. Maroto is inspired in Bootstrap and uses gofpdf. Fast and simple.

item.title: google/go-github
item.description: Go library for accessing the GitHub v3 API

item.title: mautrix/go
item.description: A Golang Matrix framework.

item.title: OWASP/Go-SCP
item.description: Golang Secure Coding Practices guide

item.title: asdf-vm/asdf
item.description: Extendable version manager with support for Ruby, Node.js, Elixir, Erlang & more

item.title: sst/sst
item.description: Build modern full-stack applications on AWS

item.title: shellhub-io/shellhub
item.description: 💻 Get seamless remote access to any Linux device. Centralized SSH for the edge and cloud computing

item.title: superseriousbusiness/gotosocial
item.description: Fast, fun, small ActivityPub server.

item.title: github/git-sizer
item.description: Compute various size metrics for a Git repository, flagging those that might cause problems

item.title: yorukot/superfile
item.description: Pretty fancy and modern terminal file manager

item.title: kubernetes-sigs/kind
item.description: Kubernetes IN Docker - local clusters for testing Kubernetes

item.title: TomWright/dasel
item.description: Select, put and delete data from JSON, TOML, YAML, XML and CSV files with a single tool. Supports conversion between formats and can be used as a Go package.

item.title: golang-migrate/migrate
item.description: Database migrations. CLI and Golang library.

item.title: Boeing/config-file-validator
item.description: Cross Platform tool to validate configuration files
